texto: I've reached a point in my life where it's the little things that matter... I was always a rebel and probably could have got much farther had I changed my attitude. But when you think about it, I got pretty far without changing attitudes. I'm happier with that.
explicacao: Citação de Veronica Lake sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I've reached a point in my life where it's the little things that matter... I was always a rebel …” articula reflexao, vida, little-things em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e little-things.
